title: Trade log: team name display, USD size, command bar win rate binding
objective: Polish the trade log and confirm command bar win rate binding. Trade log currently shows raw market slugs (e.g. 'mlb-sea-laa-2026-04-05') truncated to 30 chars — should show team abbreviations (SEA @ LAA). Trade log also shows no position size in USD. The slugToGameParts() helper already exists from DASH_009. Command bar win rate binding may already be in DASH_015 — if so, skip that change.

deliverables.label: Trade log: show team abbreviations instead of raw slug
deliverables.where: renderTrades() — the part that formats the market slug for display

deliverables.label: Trade log: show USD size
deliverables.change: Compute size: const sizeUsd = (t.qty && t.entry_px) ? fmtUsd(t.qty * t.entry_px) : '—'; Add to trade card display (e.g. next to or below the side pill): ${sizeUsd}

deliverables.label: Command bar win rate binding (only if DASH_015 did NOT already add it)
deliverables.where: updateState(s) — where cmd-open and cmd-pnl are bound

acceptance_criteria: Trade log rows show 'SEA @ LAA' style team abbreviations — NOT raw slugs
Trade log rows show USD size (e.g. $50.00 or $62.50)
Command bar win rate binding is present and working (may have been done in DASH_015)
verification: Open dashboard → Trades tab or trade log section
Each trade card shows team abbreviations (SEA @ LAA, LAD @ WSN, etc.)
Each trade card shows a dollar size
Command bar W%: updates when state refreshes
